ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true,
RecordType.DeveloperName = "ITCases", ISPICKVAL( Status,"Closed"), OR( LEN(TEXT(Type))=0 , LEN(Solution__c)=0 ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please choose the case type and/or add the solution to the case. (CAS002)
